description_long: This is a large, detached brick house set within a rectangular, hedged lot featuring a manicured lawn and a driveway leading to a single-car garage. The house has three visible stories, with a mix of flat and gable roof sections, and a prominent bay window on the front facade. The windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with large panes and some vertical strips, providing ample natural light. The main entryway is marked by a small porch with steps, flanked by decorative columns and an overhanging roof. A blossoming tree is situated near the front left corner, adding a touch of landscaping. The property is enclosed by a tall hedge, offering privacy and a defined boundary.
description: A large, three-story brick house with a mix of flat and gable roofs, bay windows, and a single-car garage, set within a hedged lot with a manicured lawn and decorative landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, bay window, garage, driveway, and a blossoming tree near the entrance.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and the hedge boundary, with less emphasis on windows and entryway.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the expansive lawn, back facade with large windows, and the garage to the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the hedge, side windows, and additional landscaping with a blossoming tree.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with bay windows and large panes
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small porch, steps, decorative columns, and an overhanging roof
